---
title: "v_calculate_wbgt_aug_2019"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=TRUE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, collapse=TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(heatmetrics)
ls("package:heatmetrics") # functions in the heatmetrics package
```

```{r}
library(ncdf4)
library(terra)
library(reticulate)
```

```{r}
# open and view preprocessed dataset
inputs <- nc_open("wbgt_inputs_aug_2019_updated.nc", write = TRUE)
names(inputs$var)
dim(ncvar_get(inputs, "solar"))
# R shows dimensions as longitude x latitude x times
```

```{r}
source("C:/Users/new account/Desktop/WBGT-heat-project/heatmetrics_vec/v_stab_srdt.R")
source("C:/Users/new account/Desktop/WBGT-heat-project/heatmetrics_vec/v_est_wind_speed.R")
source("C:/Users/new account/Desktop/WBGT-heat-project/heatmetrics_vec/v_esat.R")
source("C:/Users/new account/Desktop/WBGT-heat-project/heatmetrics_vec/v_emis_atm.R")
source("C:/Users/new account/Desktop/WBGT-heat-project/heatmetrics_vec/v_h_sphere_in_air.R")
source("C:/Users/new account/Desktop/WBGT-heat-project/heatmetrics_vec/v_Tglobe.R")
source("C:/Users/new account/Desktop/WBGT-heat-project/heatmetrics_vec/v_dew_point.R")
source("C:/Users/new account/Desktop/WBGT-heat-project/heatmetrics_vec/v_h_cylinder_in_air.R")


# TO DO: vectorize Twb(), then wbgt()


```
